description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a crab, featuring a broad, slightly flattened carapace with a pale cream coloration and subtle orange-pink highlights, especially on the tips of its large claws. The crab has two prominent, robust chelae (claws) that are slightly open and display a gradient of color from white to pinkish at the tips. Its legs are slender and jointed, with a total of eight visible walking legs arranged symmetrically on either side of the body. The underside of the crab is lighter in color, and the segmentation between the cephalothorax and abdomen is subtly visible. The surface of the shell appears hard and slightly matte, with a faintly rough texture typical of marine crustaceans. No antennae or eyes are distinctly visible in these views, giving the crab a somewhat stylized appearance.
description: A pale cream-colored crab with large pink-tipped claws and eight slender legs, featuring a hard, slightly rough shell. The body is broad and flattened, with subtle segmentation and no visible eyes or antennae.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's broad carapace, both large claws raised and open, and all eight legs visible in a symmetrical arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the crab's body depth, the curvature of the claws, and the overlapping arrangement of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carapace, the closed arrangement of the claws, and the legs extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the crab's body profile, the underside of the claws, and the alignment of the legs.
